name: Low Fat Cream Cheese Spread
recipeIngredient: 8 Slices Whole Grain Bread or Bagels
Red Bell Peppers - Sliced in Rings
Green Bell Peppers - Sliced in Rings
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the cheeses, yogurt, roasted garlic, herbs, salt, and pepper until smooth.
2. Spread the mixture evenly on 4 slices of bread or bagels.
3. Top each slice with shredded lettuce, spinach, spicy sprouts, sliced red and green bell peppers, and sliced red and green onions.
4. Add tomato slices on top.
5. Serve immediately.
